title: Philip K. Dick is Dead, Alas
author: Michael Bishop
card_summary: A satirical alternate history novel by Michael Bishop set in a world where America won the Vietnam War and Richard Nixon was reelected four times. Philip K. Dick is remembered for realist novels while his SF circulates illegally in samizdat form. When a bearded amnesiac appears in a Georgia therapist's office, the boundaries between Dick's fiction and reality blur in a tribute to Dick's own literary preoccupations.
